tasks.title: Publish v0.0.3 to pub.dev
tasks.description: Bump pubspec.yaml and CHANGELOG.md for v0.0.3, run flutter pub publish. CHANGELOG: embed liquid_glass_renderer internally, add physics-based squish/stretch animations.

tasks.title: Add badge count support to nav items
tasks.description: Add optional badgeCount to LiquidGlassNavItem. Show a small pill badge on the icon when count > 0. Badge renders above icon, disappears when count is 0 or null. Works in both Impeller and legacy modes.

tasks.title: Add haptic feedback on tab switch
tasks.description: Fire HapticFeedback.selectionClick() on tab tap and drag-end. Opt-in via enableHaptics constructor param (default: true).

tasks.title: Customizable LiquidGlassSettings passthrough
tasks.description: Expose LiquidGlassSettings as a constructor param on LiquidGlassNavBar so callers can tune thickness, blur, saturation, lightIntensity without forking the package.

tasks.title: Performance audit on mid-range Android
tasks.description: Profile frame times during drag/tilt animation on a mid-range Android device (Impeller/Vulkan). Confirm glass geometry stays cached, no toImageSync() per frame. Document results.

tasks.title: Upgrade embedded renderer when liquid_glass_renderer 0.2.0 stable ships
tasks.description: Currently embeds 0.2.0-dev.4. When stable releases on pub.dev, update the embedded source files and shaders. Check for API changes in LiquidGlassSettings and LiquidGlassLayer.

tasks.title: Improve example app with more demos
tasks.description: Add a richer example app showing: dark mode toggle, 3/4/5 item variants, custom colors, badge count demo, legacy fallback preview.
